# UC-13.4.16 · Grafana Dashboard Provisioning Reload and Schema Errors

> **Criticality:** Medium &middot; **Difficulty:** Intermediate &middot; **Pillar:** Observability &middot; **Type:** Fault, Configuration &middot; **Status:** Draft

*We watch how we use and protect smart assistant and model calls so cost, quality, and misuse stay in a range we are willing to own.*

---

## Description

Bad provisioning YAML stops dashboard delivery after Git sync or restart.

## Value

Prevents silent loss of operational dashboards during GitOps rotations.

## Implementation

Enable `filters = provisioning:debug` only when troubleshooting; default info suffices for errors.

## SPL

```spl
index=observability sourcetype="grafana:log" component=provisioning OR logger=provisioning
| search "failed" OR "error" OR "invalid" OR "cannot parse"
| stats count, values(name) as dashboards by provisioner, path
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (provisioner × path), Timeline.

## Known False Positives

Noisy periods after retention, target, or scrape changes. We compare with the Grafana or Prometheus view for the same minutes.

## References

- [Grafana configuration — log](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/setup-grafana/configure-grafana/#log)
- [Grafana provisioning](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/administration/provisioning/)
